tasks.title: Braintree Incremental Authorization Technical Specification
tasks.description: Generate a BACKEND-ONLY technical specification for implementing INCREMENTAL AUTHORIZATION using Braintree. Search for official documentation, verify links, extract authentication methods, endpoints, request/response schemas, error codes, and provide curl examples. Output to grace/rulesbook/codegen/references/Braintree/Technical_specification.
tasks.details: HOW TO RUN: Invoke Claude using: claude --dangerously-skip-permissions -p '<prompt>'. PHASE 1: Official Documentation Discovery - Find Braintree Incremental Authorization API docs, Payment Authorization endpoint, Capture endpoint, Backend integration guide, Authentication docs, Webhook docs. PHASE 2: Data Extraction - Extract auth methods, headers, API keys, endpoints (URL, method, headers, request/response schemas), incremental-specific parameters, error responses, status values. PHASE 3: Generate structured spec with Connector Info, Authentication Spec, Incremental Authorization API (Initial Auth, Incremental Auth), Idempotency Handling, Error Handling Strategy, Curl Examples.

tasks.title: Add Incremental Authorization Flow to Braintree Connector
tasks.description: Navigate to connector-service directory and trigger Claude Code to add Incremental Authorization flow to Braintree using the .gracerules_add_flow
tasks.details: 1. cd to connector-service (cd .. from grace). 2. Run: claude --dangerously-skip-permissions -p 'add Incremental Authorization flow to Braintree using grace/rulesbook/codegen/.gracerules_add_flow'. This will use the gracerules file to implement the incremental authorization flow for Braintree connector.
